pr.title: Refresh profile README hero with gradient banner and animated intro
pr.body: The profile header did not have the more polished “glowing / floating” presentation shown in the reference profile screenshot. This updates the README hero section to better match that style using GitHub-compatible generated assets. - **Hero banner** - Replaced the plain text heading with a `capsule-render` gradient banner. - Added the name and role summary directly into the banner to create a stronger first visual block. - **Animated intro** - Upgraded the typing SVG to use larger, bolder text and more prominent messaging. - Kept the animation within GitHub README rendering constraints by using external SVG generation rather than unsupported custom effects. - **Profile metadata** - Retained the profile view counter and added a follower badge. - Tuned badge colors to align with the new purple/blue hero palette. - **Representative change** ```md ```
pr.author: Copilot
